meaning: 鍗庣撼鍏勫紵濞变箰鍏徃
examples: So far it looks like Warner Brothers' gamble is paying off.
The director wanted Olivia de Havilland, then under contract to Warner Brothers.
MGM tended to put out a lot of all-star productions while Paramount excelled in comedy and Warner Bros.
This is a tactic that the company took to extremes while under Warner's control.
The enterprise value is arguably less than what the Time Warner segment is worth on its own.
